Container.Name: utilities-mcp
Container.Overview: Optional internal MCP sidecar for read-only Scrutiny storage health monitoring. This container should not publish its MCP port to the LAN.
Container.Requires: Create the Docker network first: docker network create codex-mgmt. Do not add a host port mapping for 6972 unless you intentionally expose MCP.

Config.Name: Utilities MCP Bearer Token
Config.Description: Bearer token clients must use to call this MCP server. Must match codex-terminal if utilities MCP is enabled there.

Config.Name: MCP Host
Config.Description: Bind inside the container/network only. Do not publish the port to the host.

Config.Name: Request Timeout Ms
Config.Description: Maximum time for one upstream utility API call.

Config.Name: Scrutiny URL
Config.Description: Scrutiny base URL, such as http://scrutiny:8080. Leave blank to disable Scrutiny tools.

Config.Name: Scrutiny Base Path
Config.Description: Optional reverse-proxy base path before /api, such as scrutiny. Leave blank for normal Scrutiny installs.
